'''Bolf''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Five Worlds]].

==Biography==
In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Bolf operated with other insurgents on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. They, along with other Corellians, were working with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ailyn Vel|Ailyn Habuur]]. They were arrested after [[Ben Skywalker]] had a hunch about explosives in the area where they were located.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Bolf was created by [[Karen Traviss]] for the [[2006]] [[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''. In the novel, three insurgents, including Bolf, are allied with Ailyn Vel, and, excluding Vel, are listed as two males and one female. Thus, Bolf's exact gender is never revealed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1stm}}
